name: 看得清 Readable Output
description: Adds a local readability layer to long OpenClaw replies with overview, key points, warnings, next steps, a closing reminder, and folded original text for quick verification.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Master switch for 看得清 Readable Output.

mode.label: Rewrite mode
mode.help: Adaptive only layers long or dense replies. Always layers every normal reply.

languageProfile.label: Language profile
languageProfile.help: Choose auto detection or force a script-aware layout profile.

density.label: Layout density
density.help: Control how much white space the readability layer uses.

collapseOriginal.label: Collapse original
collapseOriginal.help: Keep the raw original output folded below the readability layer.

closingCue.label: Closing reminder
closingCue.help: Show a short reminder at the end when acting on the summary needs caution.

trackStats.label: Track local stats
trackStats.help: Keep local counters for /readable status. No local chat content is uploaded anywhere.
